models.hero: The primary trust figure shown on the landing page — a politician or public figure who lends credibility to the platform.
models.partner: An organization partnered with Family to Family, displayed as a full-height logo column beside the hero photo. Family to Family itself appears in the page header, not here.
models.content: All translatable text strings for the landing page, keyed by language (uk / en).

relationships: The hero row displays the hero photo (3 parts) alongside two partner logo columns (1 part each)
Content strings are keyed by locale and used to render all visible text including button labels and the mission statement

uk.missionLine1: Програма «Сімʼя - Сімʼї» допомагає дітям захисників України,
uk.missionLine2: чиї батьки загинули, пропали безвісти або отримали інвалідність на фронті.

en.missionLine1: The Family to Family program supports only the families of Ukrainian military soldiers
en.missionLine2: whose father, mother, or son served on the front line.
